## Data Safety

- [ ] I did not commit `kanban-data/`, credentials, token caches, `.env` files, OpenCLAW config, private Gmail payloads, phone numbers, or Codex job outputs.
- [ ] If this changes agent writes, I verified the backup -> GET -> modify -> POST -> health -> readback contract.
- [ ] If this changes docs intended for public release, I checked for local paths, account names, project ids, and private workflow details.
